round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent moved from a generic list of Arabic-speaking countries to a high-confidence synthesis of the specific visual markers (bus, architecture) provided by other agents.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent successfully integrated regulatory and meta evidence (bus livery, utility poles) to refine its landscape-based deduction from medium to high confidence.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent aligned its botanical observations with the stronger architectural and regulatory evidence to confirm the location.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent reinforced its high confidence by cross-referencing the specific bus livery and architectural style identified by other agents.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent synthesized the 'classic Amman signature' (bus + limestone + wiring) to confirm the location with high confidence.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the consensus across all agents. It explicitly weighed the specific visual evidence (yellow minibus with blue stripe, limestone cladding, utility poles) to confirm Jordan, effectively eliminating other Levant candidates.
